channel.title: Microsoft Graph on My digital journey
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Graph on My digital journey

item.title: Testing the msgraph Copilot Skill: Giving AI Agents a Local Graph API Brain
item.description:
The Problem I Wanted to Solve

Large language models are trained on data that is months — sometimes over a year — old. The Microsoft Graph API has 27,700+ endpoints and is updated weekly. That gap creates a real problem: AI agents hallucinate endpoints that don’t exist, suggest deprecated paths, miss required permissions, or get $filter syntax wrong.

I wanted to see whether the open-source msgraph skill by Merill Fernando could close that gap — and whether I could wire it directly into specialist Copilot agents for a fully grounded, anti-hallucination workflow.
